forest-g3.title: Forest Clearing
text: A quiet forest clearing filled with drifting silver fog.
A small pond reflects the faint sky between branches.

pond.roomDesc: A still pond sits at the centre of the clearing, its surface unbroken.
pond.lookText: A still pond with a single fish that seems to be laughing at you.

rock.roomText: A rock sits half-buried in the mud near the water's edge.

msgByRace.goblin: The rock hits the water. A fish explodes out, absolutely furious, and spits something shiny at your feet before disappearing.
msgByRace.human: The rock splashes in. A fish leaps out, apparently offended, spits a coin at your feet, and vanishes.
msgByRace.elf: The stone disturbs the stillness. A fish rises, indignant, deposits something at your feet with great dignity, and leaves.
